nasb.text: And while they were going away to make the purchase, the bridegroom came, and those who were ready went in with him to the wedding feast; and the door was shut.

esv.text: And while they were going to buy, the bridegroom came, and those who were ready went in with him to the marriage feast, and the door was shut.

cnv.text: 她們去買油的時候，新郎來了；準備好了的童女就和他一同進去參加婚筵，門就關上了。

ccb.text: “当糊涂的伴娘去买油的时候，新郎来了。那些预备好的伴娘跟他一同进去参加婚宴，门就关了。

csbs.text: “可是她们去买的时候，新郎就来了。那些预备好了的，与新郎一同进去赴婚宴，门就关上了。
